MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint; O'Donoghue Construction, Inc.'S Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint; Declaration Of Brittany E Rupley In Support; And [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff O'Donoghue Construction, Inc.'s unopposed motion for leave to amend complaint is granted. Plaintiff is given 20 days from the date of the order to amend the complaint.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/SKF)
